name: Fladle Uberbacken (Swabian Pancakes)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Oil or Butter; To Grease Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pancake batter by blending 1 1/4 cups flour, 2 eggs, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1 cup milk.
2. Lightly oil a large frypan and cook 6 to 8 pancakes (2 or 3 at a time).
3. Heat the applesauce and stir in the raisins.
4. Divide the sauce between the pancakes and spread over each top.
5. Roll up the pancakes like jelly rolls and cut each into half with a sharp knife.
6. Grease an ovenproof dish with oil or butter; place the pancakes in the dish, setting them on the cut edges.
7. Blend 1 egg with 2 tablespoons sugar, 1/2 teaspoon salt, 1 cup milk, and sliced almonds.
8. Pour over the pancakes.
9. Dot with butter.
10. Place in a preheated oven at 375 degrees F and bake for 40 minutes. Serve immediately.
